title: Moroccan Red Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from North Africa, made with red lentils, onions, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they're translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red lentils, diced tomatoes, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper.
Stir well to combine, then add 4 cups of water.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
